tagline: 5-star rating — read-only (fractional) or an input radio group.
whenToUse: Use Rating to display an aggregate score (read-only, fractional fills like 4.6, optionally with a value and a review count) or to collect one (input mode, integer 1–max). Read-only renders as a single image with an accessible "Rated 4.6 out of 5" label; input mode is a radio group where Arrow keys move focus and selection over the stars. For an arbitrary 0–100 quantity use Progress; for a numeric quantity control use Stepper or Number Input.
